note: Curated relationship qualifiers, compiled from a full adversarial audit of every reciprocally-corroborated family edge against Memory Alpha (each entry cites the MA page whose infobox/prose states the qualifier). parent_of / sibling_of default to 'biological' and spouse_of to 'married' unless overridden here. A 'refuted' entry removes the edge from the asserted graph and records it in family-review.json instead.

relations.reason: Worf infobox lists the Rozhenkos as adoptive/foster parents; Mogh is biological.
Worf infobox lists Sergey Rozhenko as adoptive father; Mogh is biological.
Jadzia infobox lists Alexander explicitly as stepson (she married his father Worf; mother was K'Ehleyr).
Jake's biological mother is Jennifer Sisko; Kasidy is stepmother via marriage to Benjamin.
Nog's biological mother is Prinadora; Leeta is stepmother via marriage to Rom.
Kira carried Kirayoshi as maternal surrogate for Keiko O'Brien; not the biological parent.
Non-blood bond via the Klingon R'uustai ceremony; infobox labels Worf his adoptive brother.
Worf was adopted by the Rozhenkos; Nikolai is their biological son — foster/adoptive brothers, not blood.
Zek is a romantic partner, never a husband; the infobox 'partner' field is not a marriage. Removed from spouse_of.
